text:
Web scraping will never be the same.

(100% open-source visual search at scale)

PixelRAG is a retrieval system that skips HTML parsing completely.

Instead of scraping a page into text and embedding chunks, it screenshots the page and retrieves the image. A vision-language model https://t.co/3dxYra0tZZ https://t.co/tYKRgKDvSR
